nasb.text: Should I lie concerning my right? My wound is incurable, though I am without transgression.’

esv.text: in spite of my right I am counted a liar; my wound is incurable, though I am without transgression.’

cnv.text: 我雖然有公理，卻被認為是說謊的； 我雖然毫無過犯，我所受的箭傷卻無法醫治。’

ccb.text: 我虽然有理，却被认为是撒谎者； 我虽然无过，却受到致命的创伤。’
